'''shayuyu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:coaccretion|coaccretion]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-y-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:coaccretion|coaccretion]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shayuyu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæyiyith|shæyiyith]] || [[word:shæyiyij|shæyiyij]] || [[word:shæyiyish|shæyiyish]] || [[word:shæyiyi|shæyiyi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shayuyuyuth|shayuyuyuth]] || [[word:shayuyuyuj|shayuyuyuj]] || [[word:shayuyuyush|shayuyuyush]] || [[word:shayuyuyu|shayuyuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shayuyuth|shayuyuth]] || [[word:shayuyuj|shayuyuj]] || [[word:shayuyush|shayuyush]] || [[word:shayuyu|shayuyu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shayufyuth|shayufyuth]] || [[word:shayufyuj|shayufyuj]] || [[word:shayufyush|shayufyush]] || [[word:shayufyuf|shayufyuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shayuyuthu|shayuyuthu]] || [[word:shayuyuju|shayuyuju]] || [[word:shayuyushu|shayuyushu]] || [[word:shayuyuku|shayuyuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shayuyuth|shayuyuth]] || [[word:shayuyuj|shayuyuj]] || [[word:shayuyush|shayuyush]] || [[word:shayuyu|shayuyu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shayuyuthul|shayuyuthul]] || [[word:shayuyujul|shayuyujul]] || [[word:shayuyushul|shayuyushul]] || [[word:shayuyukul|shayuyukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shayuyuthuthu|shayuyuthuthu]] || [[word:shayuyujuju|shayuyujuju]] || [[word:shayuyushushu|shayuyushushu]] || [[word:shayuyuku|shayuyuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shayuyuthun|shayuyuthun]] || [[word:shayuyujun|shayuyujun]] || [[word:shayuyushun|shayuyushun]] || [[word:shayuyukun|shayuyukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shayuyuthuoro|shayuyuthuoro]] || [[word:shayuyujuoro|shayuyujuoro]] || [[word:shayuyushuoro|shayuyushuoro]] || [[word:shayuyukuoro|shayuyukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dea8a94}}
